issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot confirmed and resolved. HAs and TCs were receiving redundant task notifications for the same leads.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads from the impact window and manually close or ignore the duplicate tasks; re-enroll leads manually if tasks were missed.

issues.title: LO update not reflected in automated agent emails after loan officer change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue was reported for a deal that should have shown Julie Yocum but still referenced Paul. Luis resolved the issue on the same day it was reported.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend the agent notification email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of halting. HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks for leads that had already been closed out. Madelaine applied a filter tweak to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted transition. This was because 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that went through multiple Offer Accepted stage flips during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving tasks for these leads. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed a fix was applied. The root cause was not publicly disclosed, though no-lender-assigned deals were suspected as a contributing factor.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to generate the required tasks.
